name: Tadalafil once daily in the treatment of lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS) suggestive of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) in men without erectile dysfunction.
summary: Pooled analysis of three randomized placebo-controlled tadalafil 5 mg once-daily BPH/LUTS trials, including a subgroup of men without erectile dysfunction and patient-reported IPSS quality-of-life and BPH Impact Index outcomes.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed through NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses PubMed abstract-level pooled subgroup results.
